name: Intake Form → Project Kickoff Automator
description: Client fills intake form → auto-creates project in PM tool, generates SOW draft, sends to client for e-sign.

client_variables.sow_template_id: PandaDoc template ID for Statement of Work
client_variables.project_template_id: Notion/ClickUp template ID for project setup

setup_steps: Build intake form with all required questions
Create PandaDoc SOW template with merge fields
Build n8n workflow: Form submission → AI analysis → PM setup → SOW generation
Configure OpenAI prompt to analyze intake and recommend package/scope
Set up PandaDoc merge fields mapping from form data
Configure e-sign workflow with client notification
Test full flow: form → project → SOW → e-sign
Set up Slack notification for team awareness
n8n_workflow_nodes: OpenAI - Analyze intake, recommend scope & package
Notion/ClickUp - Populate with intake data & AI recommendations
PandaDoc - Create SOW from template with merge fields
Slack - Notify team with project summary
Gmail - Send client confirmation with project timeline
Google Sheets - Log to master project tracker
